description: Infographic on a dark navy-blue background with a thin light-blue rounded rectangular border. The headline at top reads 'ACCEPTABLE PROOF OF VACCINATION' in bold white condensed all-caps sans-serif. Inside the bordered box are three rows, each pairing a small blue line-art icon with a heading and text in white. The first row shows a QR code icon next to 'VERIFIABLE RECORDS (DIGITAL OR PAPER)' with subtext 'Vaccination certificate with QR code, digital pass via Smartphone application with QR code.' The second row shows an ID/card icon labeled 'COVID-19' next to 'NON-VERIFIABLE PAPER RECORDS' with subtext about printouts of COVID-19 vaccination records or certificates issued at national or subnational level. The third row shows a smartphone-with-photo icon next to 'NON-VERIFIABLE DIGITAL RECORDS' with text about digital photos of a vaccination card or downloaded records without a QR code. The bottom-left bears the circular DHS/CBP eagle seal and the wordmark 'U.S. Customs and Border Protection.'
notable_text: ACCEPTABLE PROOF OF VACCINATION; VERIFIABLE RECORDS (DIGITAL OR PAPER); NON-VERIFIABLE PAPER RECORDS; NON-VERIFIABLE DIGITAL RECORDS; U.S. Customs and Border Protection
